{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Ozmanthus Arelius's power fragment
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ozmanthus Arelius]] possesses a fragment of his power contained in an orb-shaped barrier.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c1">''Reaper'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
